stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aircraft is flying over Valencia VOR/DME (VLC, N39°29.1' W000°23.0') and then follows airway A34 with a north-northeast direction. The pilots should make a position report…

options.b: 1 minute or 5 NM prior to SAURA.
options.c: as soon as possible when passing PLANA.
options.d: as soon as possible when passing TATOS.
